fact_nuggets.text: Tangled Feet (Japanese: Tottering Steps) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Boosts the Pokemon's evasiveness when it is confused or cross-eyed. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD When the Pokemon is confused, its evasiveness goes up sharply! MD RT DX When the Pokemon is Confused, its evasiveness goes up sharply.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] While a Pokemon with this Ability is confused , moves targeting it have their accuracy halved. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Tangled Feet has no effect outside of battle.
